return(function(a,X,y,O,m,v,T,c,g,E,u,Z,t,G,N,r,R,e,A,b,U,D)b,t,Z,N,U,u,G,c,r,e,E,g,D,R,A=function(a,K)local X=c(K)local y=function(...)return u(a,{...},K,X)end return y end,function(a,K)local return(b(746780+4406023,{}))(X(T))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[K(454945-514863)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
